# K P Packaging

> K P Packaging Ltd. is a Mumbai-based manufacturer and distributor of coated papers and flexible packaging with over 30 years of experience. The company runs a Korean-built extrusion coating and lamination plant in Silvassa, India, and supplies pharmaceutical, food & beverage, FMCG and medical/surgical packaging to 425+ clients across 20+ countries.

Founded: 1990. Head office: A to Z Industrial Estate, Western Wing, Office No 138, Ganpat Rao Kadam Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai, 400013. Plant: 792, Apple Insulated, Nr Crown Tapes, Vaibhav Laxmi, Silvassa, India, 396193.
Contact: prem@kppackaging.com / +91 85916 56966.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://kppackaging.com/): overview
- [About](https://kppackaging.com/about/): history, team, certifications
- [Products](https://kppackaging.com/products/): full catalogue
- [Industries](https://kppackaging.com/industries/): pharma, food & beverage, FMCG, medical
- [Contact](https://kppackaging.com/contact/): offices & enquiry

## Products
- [Glassine Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/glassine-paper/): Smooth, super-calendered barrier paper for pharmaceutical packaging.
- [MG Poster Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/mg-poster-paper/): Glossy, high-strength poly-coated paper, a best-seller for primary packaging.
- [Chromo Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/chromo-paper/): Water-resistant, high-gloss coated paper built for premium print.
- [Cupstock Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/cupstock-paper/): Food-safe paper for hot & cold cups, bowls and food service.
- [3 Ply Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/3-ply-paper/): Lightweight, leak-proof foil laminate for maximum freshness.
- [4 Ply Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/4-ply-paper/): An extra polymer layer for the toughest pharma & pan-masala barriers.
- [MG Kraft Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/mg-kraft/): High-strength, eco-friendly kraft with a glossy machine-glazed top.
- [Folding Box Board](https://kppackaging.com/products/folding-box-board/): Low-density, high-stiffness board with a superb print surface.
- [Duplex Board](https://kppackaging.com/products/duplex-board/): Rigid, anti-curl coated board with a bright, print-ready face.
- [Non Tearable Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/non-tearable-paper/): Synthetic, breathable, tear-proof, the strength of paper, film and fabric.
- [Polyethylene Coated Stiffener Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/pe-coated-stiffener-paper/): Rigid PE-coated stiffener for shape, support and moisture protection.
- [Greaseproof Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/greaseproof-paper/): Non-stick, heat-resistant cellulose paper for food and baking.
- [Maplitho Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/maplitho-paper/): Eco-friendly, wood-free printing & writing paper.
- [Tissue Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/tissue-paper/): Soft, absorbent, hygienic tissue from recycled pulp.
- [Bactite Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/bactite/): Steam-sterilizable, bacterial-barrier paper for medical packaging.
- [Grid Lacquer Paper](https://kppackaging.com/products/grid-lacquer/): Self-sealing, extrusion-coated paper for surgical disposables.
